TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cihakay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 282 buwan, 731 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 358 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 373 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 39%, Bunun 7%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cihakay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cihakay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihakay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihakay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihakay hya' ga Silangkong. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cihakay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiħakaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiħakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiħakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiħakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiħakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiħakaj ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕilaŋkoŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiħakaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cihakay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 282 buwan, 731 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 358 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 373 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 39%, Bunun 7%, Tayan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cihakay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cihakay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cihakay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihakay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cihakay hya' ga Silangkong. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cihakay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiħakaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, tajan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiħakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiħakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiħakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiħakaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiħakaj ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕilaŋkoŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiħakaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
